title: Youtube PooP: CD-I What could've been
description:
The CD-I cast materialling into actors in a production company lead to disastrous results when the company need to meet a deadline for the CD-I Game Intro (and the CD-I cast are rubbish).

First see the outtakes, then the disastrous alternate Intro to the first CD-I game.

Enjoy :)

Honours
#73 - Top Favorites (Today) - Comedy
#72 - Top Rated (Today) - Comedy
